# Task: Establish Cargo workspace; relocate crate into cli/

> Task ID: GROVE-S01-T01
> Sprint: [GROVE-S01](../INDEX.md)
> Status: ✅ approved
> Estimate: M

## Description

Convert the repo to a virtual Cargo workspace. Create a root Cargo.toml with no [package] section listing member cli (core added in T02). Move src/, tests/, and the current [dependencies] into cli/ as package grove (binary still grove). Keep a single shared Cargo.lock at the root. cargo build/test --release --locked --workspace must stay green and produce target/release/grove.
